channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘What word is there for this?’ Tumbler Ridge reaches for unity in storm of grief
item.description: In Canadian town stunned by shooting perpetrated by one of its own, there is anger, but also a prevailing sense of duty Residents of the Canadian mini...

item.title: Even US will not be powerful enough ‘to go alone’, says Merz – Munich Security Conference live
item.description: German chancellor says close relationship is advantage for both Europe and US but world order as we know it ‘not longer exists’ If you need a primer o...

item.title: Scottish Labour leader says he doesn’t regret calling for Starmer to quit – UK politics live
item.description: Anas Sarwar said that he stood by what he said when he announced on Monday that he wanted the prime minister to stand down The Equality and Human Righ...

item.title: Peter Murrell accused of embezzling £459,000 from SNP, court papers show
item.description: Ex-husband of Nicola Sturgeon and former CEO of party is due to appear in Glasgow court next Friday The former chief executive of the Scottish Nationa...

item.title: Ruling against Palestine Action ban is embarrassing defeat for the government
item.description: Proscription of British direct action group has been fiercely controversial from moment it was proposed last June The list of those who criticised the...

item.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
item.description: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.

item.title: Stars offer support after husband of influencer Lorna Luxe dies
item.description: Luxe announced his death to her 1.7 million Instagram followers, saying she was "heartbroken".

item.title: Medal hope Bankes 'lost' after quarter-final exit
item.description: Charlotte Bankes hoped to "put on a better show" as her Olympic hoodoo continues with a quarter-final exit from the snowboard cross - in another misse...

item.title: Medal hope Bankes 'lost' after quarter-final exit
item.description: Charlotte Bankes hoped to "put on a better show" as her Olympic hoodoo continues with a quarter-final exit from the snowboard cross - in another misse...

item.title: Men jailed over plot to attack Jewish community
item.description: They were planning what police say could have been "the UK's deadliest terror attack".
